      public SaleService()

  • Method Details

    • recordSale

      public static int recordSale(SaleService.Sale sale)
      Records a sale in the database and returns the ID of the record so that it can be used to link products to a sale.
      Parameters:
      sale - The sale info to be recorded.
      Returns:
      The ID of the record.

    • recordSaleItem

      public static void recordSaleItem(SaleService.SaleItem saleItem)
      Records an item in a sale in the database.
      Parameters:
      saleItem - The sale item info to be recorded.

    • getSaleItems

      public static Map<SaleService.Sale, ArrayList<SaleService.SaleItem>> getSaleItems(int customerID, YearMonth month)
      Fetches all sales made by a customer and its products in a specific month. We set a timebox between the beginning and end of the month to ensure that we only fetch sales that occurred within that month. Then we fetch a list of sales made during that month. If there were no sales made, we return null. Then we iterate through each sale, and in each iteration, we create a new ArrayList of SaleService.SaleItems, fetch all sale items for that sale, using the sale ID. Finally, we link the sale and its items to a Map and return it.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      month - The month to fetch sales for.
      Returns:
      A Map linking a SaleService.Sale to a ArrayList of SaleService.SaleItems.

    • checkFlexiRateChange

      public static void checkFlexiRateChange(Customer customer, float transactionAmount)
      Following a flexible discount holder's purchase, we check if the new expenditure rate warrants a change in the flexi rate.
      Parameters:
      customer - The customer who made the purchase.
      transactionAmount - The amount of the purchase.
